collection.name: Battle of the Centaurs — Precious Metal Editions
collection.description: Posthumous original castings from Michelangelo's Battle of the Centaurs marble relief (c.1490-1492), executed in precious metals by Treasure Investments Corp. Each edition is a unique single casting in a different precious metal.

edition_info.edition_notes: One edition each in .999 fine silver, .999 fine gold, and .999 fine platinum

burn_rule: Burning this Collection Parent permanently closes the collection. No new Genesis inscriptions may be created under it. Existing provenance chains remain valid.
